purpose: Review registry update proposals before any apply rehearsal, without writing registry or production resources.

review_results_non_exhaustive.proposal_review_ready: Proposal is structurally ready for later apply rehearsal, but not approved for mutation.
review_results_non_exhaustive.proposal_review_blocked: Proposal is missing required context or has blockers.
review_results_non_exhaustive.proposal_review_not_applicable: Input is not a registry update proposal.

hard_rules: Review gate must not apply registry updates.
Review gate must not approve production mutation.
Review gate must not mutate website source, D1, R2, KV, Workers, Cloudflare, git, or deployment state.
Unknown proposal shapes must safe-stop into triage.
A ready review result only allows a later apply rehearsal, not real apply.
